mapper.select: { CALL ${schema}..USP_USER_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblUserMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userPw ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emplNo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{telNo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hp ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userGrd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inptDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userKey ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userGrntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobileGrntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
